name: Jamie - Ran Into Your Room Naked
description:
(AnyPOV) Jamie bursts into your room naked to hide from her most recent hookup.

First bot, I know its not the best but give me some credit man. I've been on Janitor AI for a while and always wanted to get in the bot making scene so I decided to try. Hoping for this to get me somewhere lol.
(Edit: 1k chats and 16k messages in a day?! God damn..)
creator: Smeglerr
